# Ryan Adamson — Luxury Real Estate
# Coldwell Banker Realty, St. Armands Circle, Sarasota, FL

> Ryan Adamson (Florida Real Estate License SL3457783, Certified Waterfront Specialist) is a luxury real estate specialist at Coldwell Banker St. Armands, serving Sarasota, Florida and the barrier islands including Longboat Key, St. Armands & Lido, Siesta Key, and Bird Key, plus the mainland luxury corridors of Downtown Sarasota, West of Trail, and Palmer Ranch. This website provides current market data, neighborhood guides, and expert insights for the Sarasota coastal luxury real estate market. Market statistics are refreshed daily from the Stellar MLS.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://adamsonfl.com/): Overview of services and areas served
- [About Ryan Adamson](https://adamsonfl.com/about): Agent biography, credentials, license, and experience
- [Areas We Serve](https://adamsonfl.com/areas): Index of all covered neighborhoods and communities
- [Longboat Key](https://adamsonfl.com/areas/longboat-key): Longboat Key luxury market data, waterfront properties, and island guide
- [St. Armands and Lido](https://adamsonfl.com/areas/st-armands-lido): St. Armands Circle and Lido Key combined market data — beachfront condos, Circle-side estates, Gulf-front new construction
- [Siesta Key](https://adamsonfl.com/areas/siesta-key): Siesta Key market data, beach properties, and area guide
- [Downtown Sarasota](https://adamsonfl.com/areas/downtown-sarasota): Downtown Sarasota condo market data — high-rise luxury, bayfront towers, and walkable urban living
- [West of Trail](https://adamsonfl.com/areas/west-of-trail-core): Cherokee Park, Hudson Bayou, McClellan Park, Avondale, Oyster Bay — Sarasota's legacy mainland luxury corridor
- [West of Trail - North](https://adamsonfl.com/areas/west-of-trail-north): Indian Beach, Sapphire Shores, Bay Haven — bayfront-adjacent estates north of downtown
- [West of Trail - South](https://adamsonfl.com/areas/west-of-trail-south): Phillippi Estates, Bay Shore, deep-water canal communities approaching Siesta Key
- [Bird Key](https://adamsonfl.com/areas/bird-key): Bird Key private island community market data and guide
- [Palmer Ranch](https://adamsonfl.com/areas/palmer-ranch): Palmer Ranch master-planned community — 30+ villages, golf communities, and market data for south Sarasota
- [New Construction](https://adamsonfl.com/new-construction): Sarasota new-construction hub — current luxury projects, pricing, and availability
- [Buyer's Guide](https://adamsonfl.com/buyers-guide): Interactive neighborhood matcher — lifestyle quiz scored against daily Stellar MLS data across all nine coverage areas
- [New Construction — Downtown Sarasota](https://adamsonfl.com/new-construction/downtown-sarasota): Downtown condo tower projects, delivery timelines, and pre-construction pricing
- [New Construction — Barrier Islands](https://adamsonfl.com/new-construction/barrier-islands): New builds on Longboat Key, Lido, Siesta Key, and Bird Key
- [The Owen](https://adamsonfl.com/new-construction/the-owen-sarasota): 29 boutique bayfront residences on Golden Gate Point, delivering mid-2026
- [The Ritz-Carlton Residences, Sarasota Bay](https://adamsonfl.com/new-construction/the-ritz-carlton-residences-sarasota): 78 flow-through residences at The Quay, completing Q4 2026
- [Rosewood Residences Lido Key](https://adamsonfl.com/new-construction/rosewood-residences-lido-key): 65 private beachfront residences — first stand-alone Rosewood residential project
- [Amara on Sarasota Bay](https://adamsonfl.com/new-construction/amara-sarasota): 54 residences with private marina ownership on Golden Gate Point, est. 2028
- [The Edge](https://adamsonfl.com/new-construction/the-edge-sarasota): 27 oversized residences at Cocoanut & Fruitville, completing late 2026
- [The Gallery](https://adamsonfl.com/new-construction/the-gallery-sarasota): 60 residences in the Rosemary District from under $1M, occupancy fall 2026
- [Mira Mar Residences](https://adamsonfl.com/new-construction/mira-mar-sarasota): 70 estate residences behind the restored 1922 Mira Mar on Palm Avenue, est. late 2028
- [SIX88](https://adamsonfl.com/new-construction/six88-sarasota): 10 residences with private marina on Golden Gate Point, occupancy 2026
- [Sarasota Area Guide Map](https://adamsonfl.com/srqmap): Interactive local map — restaurants, condo towers, neighborhoods, and things to do
- [Off-Market Properties](https://adamsonfl.com/find-my-dream-home): Tell Ryan what you're looking for — matched against off-market and pre-list opportunities
- [Market Reports](https://adamsonfl.com/market-reports): Monthly and quarterly market analysis with MLS-sourced data
- [Contact](https://adamsonfl.com/contact): Get in touch with Ryan Adamson

## Topics This Site Covers

- Sarasota luxury real estate market conditions (prices, inventory, days on market) — updated daily
- Barrier island property values and trends (Longboat Key, St. Armands & Lido, Siesta Key, Bird Key)
- Mainland luxury corridors (Downtown Sarasota, West of Trail, Palmer Ranch)
- New-construction condo and home projects across the Sarasota market
- Waterfront and Gulf-front home buying guidance (dock, seawall, bridge clearance, riparian rights)
- Neighborhood comparisons across Sarasota's coastal communities
- Local area guides (dining, lifestyle, schools, amenities)
- Coldwell Banker St. Armands agent services

## Data Sources

Market data is sourced from the Stellar MLS (My Florida Regional MLS) through the Adamson Group data pipeline and refreshed daily. Listings are assigned to areas via PostGIS geographic verification against drawn boundary polygons — by actual coordinates, not just postal code. Statistics include median list and sold prices, price per square foot, days on market, sale-to-list ratios, active inventory by price band, waterfront and new-construction counts, and typical association fees for each community served.
